expectations.text: Reads or references all three core CSVs (scenes.csv, scene-briefs.csv, scene-intent.csv)
expectations.evidence: References all three CSVs with specific field-level analysis

expectations.text: Checks or mentions multiple hone domains (at least 2 of: registries, gaps, briefs, structural)
expectations.evidence: Covers all 4 domains in numbered sections: 1. Gaps, 2. Brief Quality Issues, 3. Registries, 4. Structural Issues

expectations.text: Identifies new-x1 (or scenes with empty fields) as having data gaps
expectations.evidence: Identifies new-x1 as 'almost entirely empty in scene-briefs.csv' and act2-sc01/act2-sc02 as 'entirely missing'

expectations.text: Presents findings in a prioritized or structured way
expectations.evidence: Numbered priority list in Recommendations: 1. Fill gaps, 2. Concretize existing briefs, 3. Registry normalization

expectations.text: Recommends which domain to tackle first based on the project state
expectations.evidence: Recommends gaps first with clear reasoning: '3 scenes without briefs are the critical blocker'
